defaultConfig.title: portal_apps
defaultConfig.description: List all registered Portal UI widget apps (apps that render inside portal pages). These are portal-specific apps, NOT server plugins — use "list_plugins" for all Mashroom server plugins. Returns app name, description, version, category.

defaultConfig.title: portal_themes
defaultConfig.description: List all registered portal THEMES (visual styling templates). NOT apps or sites. Returns theme name, description, version.

defaultConfig.title: portal_layouts
defaultConfig.description: List all registered portal LAYOUTS (page structure templates). NOT themes or apps. Returns layout name, layoutId, description.

defaultConfig.title: page_enhancements
defaultConfig.description: List all registered portal page enhancement plugins (global JS/CSS injectors that modify every page). NOT plugin loaders — use "list_plugin_loaders" for server plugin loaders. Returns enhancement name, description, version, order.

defaultConfig.title: app_enhancements
defaultConfig.description: List all registered portal app enhancement plugins (custom client services / setup enhancers for portal apps). NOT plugin loaders — use "list_plugin_loaders" for server plugin loaders. Returns enhancement name and description.

defaultConfig.title: portal_sites
defaultConfig.description: List all registered SITEs (websites/paths in the portal). NOT apps — use "portal_apps" for apps. Returns site path, title, page count, defaultTheme, defaultLayout.

defaultConfig.title: get_site
defaultConfig.description: Get full details of a single site by its ID, including pages tree, theme, layout and virtual hosts.

defaultConfig.title: update_site
defaultConfig.description: Update an existing site. At minimum provide siteId. Optional fields to update: title, path, defaultTheme, defaultLayout.

defaultConfig.title: insert_site
defaultConfig.description: Create a new site with the given ID, title and path.

defaultConfig.title: site_pages
defaultConfig.description: List all PAGES within a specific SITE. Use this to see what pages belong to a site after listing sites with "portal_sites".

defaultConfig.title: get_page
defaultConfig.description: Get full details of a single page by its ID, including theme override, layout, extra CSS, keywords and assigned portal apps.

defaultConfig.title: update_page
defaultConfig.description: Update properties of an existing page. Provide pageId and at least one field to change.

defaultConfig.title: insert_page
defaultConfig.description: Create a new page and add it to an existing site. Requires sitePath so the page is visible under that site.

defaultConfig.title: get_app_instance
defaultConfig.description: Get the configuration of a portal app instance by plugin name and optional instance ID.

defaultConfig.title: update_app_instance
defaultConfig.description: Update the configuration of an existing portal app instance.

defaultConfig.title: list_plugins
defaultConfig.description: List ALL Mashroom server plugins (web-apps, api plugins, middleware, services, storage, plugin-loaders). Use this to see every loaded plugin in the server. NOT portal apps — use "portal_apps" for portal UI widget apps. Returns plugin name, type (e.g. web-app, api, middleware), status (pending/loaded/error), and package info.

defaultConfig.title: get_plugin
defaultConfig.description: Get full details of a single Mashroom server plugin by its exact name. Shows type, status (pending/loaded/error), config JSON, tags, error message and package info. Use this after finding a plugin with "list_plugins".

defaultConfig.title: list_plugin_packages
defaultConfig.description: List all npm plugin packages currently loaded in the Mashroom server. Each package can contain one or more plugins. Returns package name, version, status, and number of contained plugins. NOT portal apps — use "portal_apps" for UI widgets.

defaultConfig.title: get_plugin_package
defaultConfig.description: Get full details of a single npm plugin package by its exact package name. Shows version, author, license, homepage, status, path, and all contained plugin definitions. Use this after finding a package with "list_plugin_packages".

defaultConfig.title: list_plugin_loaders
defaultConfig.description: List all registered Mashroom plugin loaders. Each loader handles a specific plugin type (e.g. web-app, api, middleware, services). Returns the plugin type and the loader name for each. NOT apps, NOT enhancements — use "portal_apps" for UI widgets or "page_enhancements"/"app_enhancements" for enhancement plugins.

defaultConfig.title: plugins_by_type
defaultConfig.description: List all Mashroom server plugins filtered by a specific plugin type. Common types: web-app, api, middleware, services, storage, plugin-loader. Returns matching plugin names, statuses and package info. Use this to narrow down the full plugin list from "list_plugins".
